== Notes for [[Item:Q80252|Q80252]] ==

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=bernd-jansen&id=I25972

------------------------------------------------------------------

•ID: I66502

•Name: Commodus Pompeianus

•Given Name: Commodus

•Surname: Pompeianus

•Sex: M

•_UID: 6081C87B20DF2C49BAA2CD6A7F0C96BF0B45

•Change Date: 14 Aug 2004

•Birth: ABT 175

•Death: 209

Father: Pompeianus Quintianus of Rome b: ABT 150

Mother: Aurelia Vera of Rome b: ABT 158

Marriage 1 Mariana Minor Marius b: ABT 180

•Married:

Children

1. Aurelia Pompeiana Pompeianus

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I66502

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
